channel.title: SRE on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in SRE on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure SRE Agent with new capabilities
item.description:
Azure SRE Agent is now generally available. The GA release adds new capabilities focused on incident diagnosis, automated response workflows, and improving uptime while reducing operational toil.

  • Source: Azure Updates
